subcodes.first_line: O cherished remnant of that soul who was nigh unto the Most Glorious Beauty! Your letter was received, and its contents were of the utmost eloquence and refinement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن مقرب درگاه جمال ابهی نامه شما رسید مضمون در نهایت فصاحت و بلاغت
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
